---
title: "\'The Barnacle: A Manuscript Magazine of the 1860s\'"
---

## \'The Barnacle: A Manuscript Magazine of the 1860s\'

**Author:** Julia Courtney
**Date:** 1994
**Imprint:** in The Girl\'s Own: Cultural Histories of the Anglo-American Girl 1830-1915 ed. Claudia Nelson and Lynne Vallone.  Arkansas and London: University of Georgia Press

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
